title: Endless Conveyor
description:
You lumber into a shack with a bright but crooked sign that reads:
[aqua]"ENDLESS FEAST - PAY WHAT YOU HUNGER!"[/aqua]

Inside, a [orange]willowy multi-armed chef[/orange] is deftly preparing [green]bites of food[/green] and placing them onto a [sine]winding chitinous belt[/sine].

One of the chef's arms point to a sign:
[blue]40[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] each

options.title: Grab Caviar off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]40[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Gain [green]4[/green] Max HP. Continue feasting!

options.title: Grab Clam Roll off the Belt
Grab Fried Eel off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]40[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Add a random Colorless Card to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Continue feasting!

options.title: Grab Golden Fysh off the Belt
Grab Jelly Liver off the Belt
Grab Seapunk Salad off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]40[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Add [gold]Feeding Frenzy[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Continue feasting!

options.title: Grab Spicy Snappy off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]40[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card. Continue feasting!

options.title: Grab Suspicious Condiment off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]40[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Procure a random [gold]Potion[/gold]. Continue feasting!

options.title: Broke
options.description: You could eat more but you are out of [gold]Gold[/gold].

conditions: All players have at least 120 Gold
notes:
This is a multi-stage looping event where you repeatedly choose dishes from a conveyor belt. Each grab (except Golden Fysh) costs 40 Gold and provides different benefits, then a new dish is rolled.

[gold]Dish Selection Mechanics:[/gold]
Dishes are selected via weighted random pool (excluding the dish you just grabbed):
- [blue]Caviar[/blue] (weight 6): Gain 4 Max HP
- [blue]Spicy Snappy[/blue] (weight 3): Upgrade a random card in your deck
- [blue]Jelly Liver[/blue] (weight 3): Transform a card in your deck
- [blue]Fried Eel[/blue] (weight 3): Add a random Colorless card to your deck
- [blue]Clam Roll[/blue] (weight 6, only if not at full HP): Heal 10 HP
- [blue]Suspicious Condiment[/blue] (weight 3, only if you have potion slots): Get a random potion
- [blue]Golden Fysh[/blue] (weight 1, only after first grab): [green]LUCKY WINNER![/green] Gain 75 Gold with no cost
- [blue]Seapunk Salad[/blue] (guaranteed every 5 grabs): Add [gold]Feeding Frenzy[/gold] card to your deck

[gold]Special Notes:[/gold]
- Golden Fysh is the only free option and is the only way to gain gold in this event
- Every 5 grabs, Seapunk Salad is automatically selected instead of rolling randomly
- The event continues until you choose Leave or run out of Gold (at which point you must leave)
- Observe the Chef is only available at the start and ends the event
